bill.short_title: Further Extension of Continuing Appropriations Act, 2021

provisions.description: Extends the Continuing Appropriations Act, 2021 by amending the expiration date in section 106(3) of Public Law 116-159 to December 28, 2020.
provisions.raw_text: That the Continuing Appropriations Act, 2021 (division A of Public Law 116–159) is further amended by striking the date specified in section 106(3) and inserting ''December 28, 2020''.
notes: This is the sole operative provision of the bill — a one-sentence CR extension.
Section 106(3) of P.L. 116-159 specifies the expiration date for the continuing resolution; this amendment extends the CR through December 28, 2020.
No dollar amounts are appropriated; funding continues at the rate established by the original CR (division A of P.L. 116-159).

cross_references.description: Strikes the existing CR expiration date and inserts December 28, 2020

flagged_issues: Extremely short bill with a single operative clause extending the CR expiration date. No explicit dollar amounts or section headers present.
The short title clause was not extracted as a separate provision per instructions.
